LanguageData.AM_AncientAirConditioner.description: An ancient air conditioning machine. Its internals were smashed long ago and what wasn't looted has rusted away in the time since.
LanguageData.AM_AncientAirConditioner.label: ancient air conditioner
LanguageData.AM_AncientATM.description: An ancient ATM. Smashed and rusted, it is completely useless now.\n\nHow it got here is hard to say.
LanguageData.AM_AncientATM.label: ancient ATM
LanguageData.AM_AncientBarrel.description: An ancient, broken barrel that looks like it once contained waste of some sort. The only thing it contains now is a smear of dried sludge.
LanguageData.AM_AncientBarrel.label: ancient barrel
LanguageData.AM_AncientBed.description: An old, rotted mattress on a rusty frame. Though uncomfortable, it can still be used, but it's too dilapidated to restore.
LanguageData.AM_AncientBed.label: ancient bed
LanguageData.AM_AncientContainer.description: A shipping container from some ancient freight-carrying vehicle. It has long since deteriorated into uselessness.
LanguageData.AM_AncientContainer.label: ancient container
LanguageData.AM_AncientCrate.description: An ancient, broken crate. Any valuables it once contained have degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.AM_AncientCrate.label: ancient crate
LanguageData.AM_AncientDisplayBank.description: An ancient computer interface. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.AM_AncientDisplayBank.label: ancient display bank
LanguageData.AM_AncientEquipmentBlocks.description: A collection of ancient equipment blocks of unknown function. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.AM_AncientEquipmentBlocks.label: ancient equipment blocks
LanguageData.AM_AncientFence.description: An ancient fence made of reinforced concrete posts joined by concrete panels.
LanguageData.AM_AncientFence.label: ancient fence
LanguageData.AM_AncientFuelNode.description: An ancient, unstable fuel node once used to charge machines with fuel. It has become unstable over the years due to lack of maintenance.
LanguageData.AM_AncientFuelNode.label: ancient unstable fuel node
LanguageData.AM_AncientGenerator.description: An ancient electrical generator. Its usable parts were smashed or looted long ago, and the rest has rusted into uselessness.
LanguageData.AM_AncientGenerator.label: ancient generator
LanguageData.AM_AncientHydrant.description: An ancient hydrant. Heavily rusted, it is completely useless now.\n\nHow it got here is hard to say.
LanguageData.AM_AncientHydrant.label: ancient hydrant
LanguageData.AM_AncientKitchenSink.description: An ancient kitchen sink made of some non-metallic fiber-sheet material. It is badly deteriorated and there's no way to salvage anything from it.\n\nHow it got here must be a long story.
LanguageData.AM_AncientKitchenSink.label: ancient kitchen sink
LanguageData.AM_AncientLockerBank.description: An ancient, rusted bank of lockers. All of the lockers have been forced open with nothing valuable left behind.
LanguageData.AM_AncientLockerBank.label: ancient locker bank
LanguageData.AM_AncientMachine.description: A large ancient machine case filled with unknown machinery. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.AM_AncientMachine.label: ancient machine
LanguageData.AM_AncientMicrowave.description: An ancient device for heating food. Smashed and rusted, it is completely useless now.\n\nHow it got here is hard to say.
LanguageData.AM_AncientMicrowave.label: ancient microwave
LanguageData.AM_AncientMilitaryCrate.description: An ancient, military-looking crate. It was broken long ago and any valuables it once contained were looted.
LanguageData.AM_AncientMilitaryCrate.label: ancient military crate
LanguageData.AM_AncientOperatingTable.description: A table once used for surgical operations. It has long since deteriorated into uselessness.
LanguageData.AM_AncientOperatingTable.label: ancient operating table
LanguageData.AM_AncientOven.description: An ancient oven. Smashed and rusted, it is completely useless now.\n\nHow it got here is hard to say.
LanguageData.AM_AncientOven.label: ancient oven
LanguageData.AM_AncientPipelineSection.description: A section from an ancient pipeline. It once carried some valuable fluid over long distances. Now it's been looted and deteriorated to uselessness.
LanguageData.AM_AncientPipelineSection.label: ancient pipeline section
LanguageData.AM_AncientPipes.description: A bunch of rusted old pipes. It is hard to say how these ended up here.
LanguageData.AM_AncientPipes.label: ancient pipes
LanguageData.AM_AncientPodCar.description: An ancient pod car once capable of automated flight. Its valuable parts were looted long ago, and the rest is badly deteriorated.
LanguageData.AM_AncientPodCar.label: ancient pod car
LanguageData.AM_AncientRazorWire.description: A piece of ancient razor wire. It has been deteriorating for many years and no longer poses any danger.
LanguageData.AM_AncientRazorWire.label: ancient razor wire
LanguageData.AM_AncientRefrigerator.description: An ancient refrigerator. It was stripped of interesting parts long ago.
LanguageData.AM_AncientRefrigerator.label: ancient refrigerator
LanguageData.AM_AncientRustedCar.description: An ancient, broken car. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago.
LanguageData.AM_AncientRustedCar.label: ancient car
LanguageData.AM_AncientRustedCarFrame.description: An ancient, rusted car frame. The body shell has long since rusted away to nothing.
LanguageData.AM_AncientRustedCarFrame.label: ancient car frame
LanguageData.AM_AncientRustedJeep.description: An ancient, broken troop carrier. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago.
LanguageData.AM_AncientRustedJeep.label: ancient troop carrier
LanguageData.AM_AncientRustedTruck.description: An ancient, broken truck. Everything useful either rusted away or was looted long ago.
LanguageData.AM_AncientRustedTruck.label: ancient truck
LanguageData.AM_AncientSecurityTurret.description: An ancient, broken security turret. The valuable parts have all been looted or smashed.
LanguageData.AM_AncientSecurityTurret.label: ancient security turret
LanguageData.AM_AncientShoppingCart.description: An ancient, rusted shopping cart. How exactly it got here is a mystery, but the story is long and probably quite sad.
LanguageData.AM_AncientShoppingCart.label: ancient shopping cart
LanguageData.AM_AncientStove.description: An ancient stove. Smashed and rusted, it is completely useless now.\n\nHow it got here is hard to say.
LanguageData.AM_AncientStove.label: ancient stove
LanguageData.AM_AncientTankTrap.description: An defensive fortification for stopping vehicles. It's been deteriorating for many years.
LanguageData.AM_AncientTankTrap.label: ancient tank trap
LanguageData.AM_AncientToilet.description: An ancient toilet. Smashed long ago, it is completely useless now.\n\nHow it got here is hard to say.
LanguageData.AM_AncientToilet.label: ancient toilet
LanguageData.AM_AncientVendingMachine.description: An ancient vending machine. It was smashed ages ago and generations of looters have taken every conceivably useful part. How it ended up here is a mystery.
LanguageData.AM_AncientVendingMachine.label: ancient vending machine
LanguageData.AM_AncientWheel.description: An ancient wheel from some kind of vehicle. The rubber has deteriorated away and the metal is twisted and rusted.
LanguageData.AM_AncientWheel.label: ancient wheel
LanguageData.AM_MI26_D.description: An ancient giant helicopter that has crashed, with a vague identification number on its body: mi26.
LanguageData.AM_MI26_D.label: ancient giant helicopter
